summary: Recoverable transitions require a fresh typed stop reason; explicit null is rejected as invalid_state before authority persistence while historical reasonless stopped artifacts remain readable.
inspection_summary: Independent review covered Story, Architecture, Test Plan, implementation, tests, strict-head evidence, focused replay, and a byte-for-byte nonmutation probe.
inspection_evidence: node --test --test-name-pattern='recoverable transitions require|malformed transition metadata|historical stopped null|lifecycle matrix' test/guarded-run-session.test.js => 4/4 pass
judgment_delta: Explicit null previously crossed the public boundary -> final HEAD validates typed stop reason before mutation and preserves the historical-read compatibility boundary.
